scene_overview: The scene is a kitchen-based test room where the player must interact with various objects to complete a sequence of tasks, such as unlocking, washing, and assembling items.
gate_chains: Step 1: Use KitchenBadgeUnlockReceiver#1770515124 to unlock PantryKeyUnlockReceiver#351089451.
Step 2: Use PantryKeyUnlockReceiver#351089451 to unlock MixingBowlSocket#934798471.
Step 3: Wash items at SinkWashStation#2088852900 to enable MixingBowlSocket#934798471.
Step 4: Use KnifeSlotDetector#677490823 to enable ServingPlateSocket#807955241.
Step 5: Use MixingBowlSocket#934798471 to enable ServingCounterSocket#1062148655.
main_path: Step 7: Place final items in ServingCounterSocket#1062148655.
failure_paths: Failing to interact with KitchenBadgeUnlockReceiver#1770515124 prevents progress.
Skipping the washing step at SinkWashStation#2088852900 results in MixingBowlSocket#934798471 not being enabled.
Placing items in the wrong order in MixingBowlSocket#934798471 or ServingPlateSocket#807955241 causes errors.
Not using KnifeSlotDetector#677490823 before ServingPlateSocket#807955241 results in an incomplete sequence.
oracle_hints: PantryKeyUnlockReceiver#351089451 becomes interactable after using KitchenBadgeUnlockReceiver#1770515124.
MixingBowlSocket#934798471 becomes interactable after washing items at SinkWashStation#2088852900.
ServingPlateSocket#807955241 becomes interactable after using KnifeSlotDetector#677490823.
ServingCounterSocket#1062148655 becomes interactable after completing MixingBowlSocket#934798471 and ServingPlateSocket#807955241.
completion_criteria: All required items are placed in ServingCounterSocket#1062148655.
